args:
set -euo pipefail

selector='migrations.opensearch.org/workflow={{workflow.name}}'
patch='{"metadata":{"ownerReferences":[{"apiVersion":"argoproj.io/v1alpha1","kind":"Workflow","name":"{{workflow.name}}","uid":"{{workflow.uid}}"}]}}'

kubectl get approvalgates.migrations.opensearch.org -l "$selector" -o name \
  | xargs -r -n 1 kubectl patch --type merge -p "$patch" \
  || { echo "ERROR: failed to patch one or more approvalgate ownerReferences" >&2; exit 1; }

parameters.name: snapshotItemConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("label", item['label'], "snapshotPrefix", item['snapshotPrefix'], "config", fromJSON(item['config']), "repo", fromJSON(item['repo']), "semaphoreConfigMapName", item['semaphoreConfigMapName'], "semaphoreKey", item['semaphoreKey'], "dependsOnProxySetups", fromJSON(toJSON(item))['dependsOnProxySetups'], "configChecksum", item['configChecksum']))}}

parameters.name: kafkaClusterConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("name", item['name'], "version", item['version'], "config", fromJSON(item['config']), "topics", fromJSON(item['topics']), "configChecksum", item['configChecksum'], "resourceUid", item['resourceUid']))}}

parameters.name: proxyConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.dict("name", item['name'], "sourceConfig", fromJSON(item['sourceConfig']), "kafkaConfig", fromJSON(item['kafkaConfig']), "proxyConfig", fromJSON(item['proxyConfig']), "configChecksum", sprig.dig('configChecksum', '', item), "topicConfigChecksum", sprig.dig('topicConfigChecksum', '', item), "checksumForSnapshot", sprig.dig('checksumForSnapshot', '', item), "checksumForReplayer", sprig.dig('checksumForReplayer', '', item), "resourceUid", item['resourceUid']))}}
